title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
